narrative:
Iliman Ndiaye is a Right Winger representing France at the World Cup. His overall rating of 7.21/10 places him among the top 3% of right wingers in the tournament. This impressive rating reflects both his club form and current World Cup performances, with 66% of his rating derived from this tournament.

Ndiaye's World Cup performance highlights his attacking prowess, with 0.732 goals and 1.463 assists per 90 minutes. He also contributes significantly to build-up play, recording 2.927 key passes per 90 minutes. Interestingly, his high goal output significantly exceeds his 0.159 expected goals per 90, suggesting clinical finishing or fortunate bounces.

Ndiaye appears to be a crucial impact player for France, delivering decisive moments despite playing only 123 World Cup minutes. Scouts should closely observe if his exceptional goal and assist rates, particularly relative to his expected figures, can be sustained. His continued ability to create chances and contribute defensively will be vital for his team's progression.
